title: Onboarding
description: Client setup, welcome, and diagnostic access.

title: Diagnostic
description: Client completes the Trinity diagnostic; report generated.

title: Appraisal
description: Financial analysis, addbacks, appraisal report. (Not performed in-platform for v1.)

title: Prioritisation
description: AI suggests the initial module order from diagnostic and appraisal; advisor reviews and adjusts.

title: Planning Workshop
description: Client session to review findings and agree the program plan.

title: Financial Clarity & Reporting
description: Placeholder — module content to be supplied by BBA.

title: Due Diligence Preparation
description: Consolidation stage where DD items from all modules are prepared.

title: Transition & Handover Planning
description: Key person dependence, customer/supplier handover, integration, post-sale contracts, transition management.

title: Sale Planner Checklist
description: Sale type, sale structure, marketing plan, and issues to address.
